auth.loginRequiredDesc: Sign in or create an account to continue.
auth.noAccessDesc: This section is for authorized roles only.

misPagos.title: My payouts
misPagos.intro: What Only G owes you for your sales and work. The transfer is done manually by the team; here you see the status of each payment.
misPagos.totalHint: Total not yet transferred to you.
misPagos.sinPendientes: You have no pending payouts right now.
misPagos.error: Couldn't load your payouts. Please try again.

login.subtitleReset: We'll send you a link to reset it.
login.resetSent: If an account exists for {email}, we sent you a link to reset your password. Check your inbox (and spam).
login.name: Name
login.artistHint: After creating your account we'll take you to set up your artist profile (includes a payment).
login.fnProductorHint: Offer productions from an Only G venue. Requires approval.
login.fnBeatmakerHint: Publish and sell your beats on the platform. Requires approval.
login.convenioSaveFailed: Your account was created, but we couldn't send your partnership request. Please try again in a moment.

authErrors.emailInUse: An account with that email already exists.
authErrors.weakPassword: The password must be at least 6 characters.
authErrors.popupClosed: You closed the sign-in window before finishing.
authErrors.accountExists: An account with that email already exists using another sign-in method.
authErrors.popupBlocked: The browser blocked the popup. Enable it and try again.
authErrors.notAllowed: This sign-in method is not enabled in Firebase.
authErrors.tooManyRequests: Too many attempts. Try again in a moment.

convenioEnviado.title: Request sent
convenioEnviado.body: Your agreement request is under review. We'll let you know via the notification bell and in chat once the admin responds.

account.title: My account
account.emailUnverified: Your email is not verified yet.
account.verifySent: We resent the verification email. Check your inbox (and spam).
account.settingsSoon: Soon you'll be able to adjust your preferences here.

gnotesPremium.title: G Notes premium
gnotesPremium.descripcion: Unlimited AI for your writing: autocomplete and creative panel with no daily cap, in the G Notes editor.

datosPago.title: Payout details
datosPago.description: Where does Only G pay you? These details are private: only you and the studio can see them.

efectivo.notaPlaceholder: How you'd prefer to receive the cash
efectivo.hint: We'll arrange the cash payment with you directly.

datosPago.incomplete: Fill in the fields for the chosen method.

prompt.title: Want to set up your payout details?
prompt.description: Tell us where you'd like Only G to pay you. You can do it now or later from your account.

solicitudes.intro: Your appointments, productions and quotes, with their status and chat with the studio.
solicitudes.loadError: We couldn't load your requests. If this is the first time, Firestore may ask you to create an index (check the browser console for the link).
solicitudes.noCitas: You don't have any appointments yet.
solicitudes.noPedidos: You don't have any orders yet.

solicitudDetail.paymentStartHint: Choose how to pay and upload your receipt in the payment chat.
solicitudDetail.paymentInfo: We'll share the payment details/QR via chat. Once you pay, upload your receipt here.
solicitudDetail.receiptUnderReview: We received your receipt. The team is reviewing it; we'll confirm via chat.
solicitudDetail.proposalHint: The studio proposed this price. Accept it to generate your booking, or reject it.
solicitudDetail.quoteAcceptedNote: You accepted the proposal. Your booking will be generated shortly — find it in "My requests".

pedidoDetail.title: Order
pedidoDetail.confirmedNote: Your payment was confirmed. All bookings in this order are now confirmed — check them in "My requests".

thread.empty: No messages yet. Write to talk with the studio.

adminSolicitud.artistProfileNote: Request for an artist profile. When you confirm the payment, assign the artista role in the Firebase console and activate premium at /admin/perfiles.
adminSolicitud.sessionAutoCreated: The session is created automatically when payment is confirmed (the server generates it).
adminSolicitud.assignProducerHint: Pick a producer registered at this venue. When you confirm the payment, the server creates the session in their console.
adminSolicitud.noSedeProducers: This venue has no producers yet. <link>Register them in Studios</link> first.

Art begins where the fear

of expression ends.

production.title: Music production

artistsPage.metaDesc: Discover the artists and the sound they create.

servicesPage.metaDesc: Recording, mixing, mastering, production and studio rental in Barranquilla and Bogotá.

servicesPage.intro: Rates for Barranquilla (Atlántico) and Bogotá. Fixed-price services are booked directly; custom projects are quoted.
servicesPage.disclaimer: * Reference rates (placeholder). They will be updated with Only G's real prices.

productionsPage.metaDesc: Music and audiovisual production by Only G.

eventsPage.metaDesc: Tours, dates and live experiences by Only G.

beats.metaDesc: Explore and buy beats from our producers.
beats.title: Beats
beats.intro: Explore and buy beats from our producers.
beats.publicarIntro: Upload your beat and put it in Only G's public catalog.
beats.audioPreviewHint: Upload a tagged preview; the full file will be delivered after purchase (coming soon).
beats.masterHint: Delivered to the buyer after purchase; not downloadable from the catalog. Optional for now.
beats.sinBeats: You haven't published any beats yet.

beats.tomarAviso: When you take a request, coordinate delivery with the client via chat.

adminDashboard.title: Control Panel
adminDashboard.subtitle: Manage artists, bookings, finances and operations for Only G Music.

adminDashboard.loadError: Could not load requests (do you have the admin role and deployed rules?).

adminRoles.intro: Find a user and adjust their permissions.
adminRoles.syncNote: Beatmaker and producer are partners: no membership fee, and their profile syncs with these tabs.
adminRoles.errorSelfAdmin: You can't remove your own admin role.

adminConvenios.intro: Review and respond to producer and beatmaker requests.
adminConvenios.sinSedes: No venues created yet. Create one to be able to approve producer requests.
adminConvenios.errorAprobar: Couldn't approve the request. Try again.
adminConvenios.errorRechazar: Couldn't reject the request. Try again.

adminBeats.title: Beat sales & payouts
adminBeats.intro: Review beat sales and mark pending payouts to beatmakers.
adminBeats.errorPagar: Couldn't mark it as paid. Try again.

adminPayouts.title: Payables
adminPayouts.intro: Settle what Only G owes each partner. See their payout details and record the payment with its receipt.
adminPayouts.sinDatos: This partner hasn't set up their payout details yet.

produccion.title: Record producer payment
produccion.intro: Manually record what Only G owes a producer for their work. You enter the net amount directly (no commission).
produccion.error: Couldn't record the payment. Try again.
produccion.errorNoProductor: The recipient is not a producer.

modal.title: Record payment
modal.para: You're recording the payment to {nombre} of
modal.comprobanteHint: Attach the screenshot or PDF of the transfer.
modal.error: Couldn't record the payment. Try again.

adminConfigPagos.title: Payment details
adminConfigPagos.intro: Where clients pay you. Shown in the payment chat with a copy button. Leave blank whatever you don't use.
adminConfigPagos.notaPh: E.g., send the receipt in this chat.
adminConfigPagos.breBPh: Your Bre-B key number or alias
adminConfigPagos.errorSave: Could not save. Please try again.
adminConfigPagos.globalNota: This is the default (global) method: used for G Notes, memberships, beats and any web payment. A sede can only set its own method for production payments.
adminConfigPagos.sinSedesConPago: No sede has its own payment details yet.

ceoConfig.title: Commercial settings
ceoConfig.intro: Platform commissions and prices. Both the server and the client read these values.
ceoConfig.warning: Changes only affect NEW sales and charges. Anything already charged stays frozen at the price in effect at that time.

errors.comisionRango: The commission must be between 0% and 100%.
errors.precioRango: The price must be a whole number greater than 0.

comisiones.title: Commissions
comisiones.desc: Internal: only you (CEO) can see them. This is the margin Only G keeps.
comisiones.beatHint: Percentage the platform keeps from each beat sale.
comisiones.productorHint: Percentage Only G keeps from each booking with a producer; the rest is the producer's net. Blank = manual payout (no automatic split).
comisiones.porSedeHint: Override the cut for a specific location. Blank inherits the global commission; 0% = that location is paid manually (no automatic split).

precios.title: Prices
precios.desc: The buyer sees these. They must match what is charged.

ceoAnalitica.title: Analytics
ceoAnalitica.intro: Google Analytics (GA4) already collects everything automatically —visits, countries, devices, pages, time and events—. Open the reports here; there's no duplicate dashboard inside the app.
ceoAnalitica.propertyIdHint: In GA4 → Admin → Property Settings. It's a number; used to deep-link to your property.

paginas.r: Engagement › Pages and screens (average engagement time).

eventos.r: Engagement › Events (each event with its count).

abandono.r: Explore › Funnel exploration or Paths; and the Retention report.

eventos.title: The app's own events
eventos.desc: Only G sends these funnel events; they appear in GA4's Events report:

errors.save: Couldn't save. Check the ID (numbers only).

adminEstudios.title: Studios
adminEstudios.intro: Edit your venues: city, address, schedule and where clients pay you (if a studio collects to its own account). You can also create new venues and assign producers.
adminEstudios.crearError: Could not create the venue. Check the name and try again.
adminEstudios.pagoHint: If left blank, this venue uses the general payment details.
adminEstudios.productoresHint: Search for a user and assign them: we grant the producer role and register them at the venue.
adminEstudios.errorSave: Could not save. Please try again.

adminProductores.title: Producers
adminProductores.intro: Manage the label's producers. Each one is a section in the home scroll; order, photos and text are edited here. The template is the same for everyone.
adminProductores.empty: No producers yet. Add the first one.
adminProductores.fieldRolePh: Founder and owner of Only G Music
adminProductores.fieldQuotePh: From street rap to founding a label.
adminProductores.coverPcHint: Landscape photo. Shown on desktops and large screens. Required.
adminProductores.coverMobileHint: Portrait photo for phones (optional). If omitted, the desktop one is used.
adminProductores.galleryHint: Editorial photos below the cover. The first one is shown large.

adminContabilidad.title: Accounting
adminContabilidad.intro: All your accounting in one place: income statement, payments, expenses, assets and balance sheet. Share or download the report as PDF or Excel.

export.title: Accounting report — Only G Music
export.notaPositiva: The period closes with a positive profit of {monto} ({margen}% margin).
export.notaNegativa: During the period, expenses exceeded income, resulting in a negative profit of {monto}.
export.sinGastos: No expenses recorded for the period.

adminFinanzas.title: Finances
adminFinanzas.intro: Revenue from confirmed bookings. Derived from bookings (single source of truth).
adminFinanzas.loadError: Could not load data (admin role and deployed rules required?).

adminBienes.title: Assets
adminBienes.intro: Inventory of the studio's fixed assets. Book value is computed with straight-line depreciation (useful life + residual value).
adminBienes.loadError: Couldn't load the assets (admin role and rules deployed?).

add.title: Add asset
add.name: Name
add.error: Couldn't save the asset. Check the data and try again.

retireModal.title: Retire asset
retireModal.message: Retire "{name}"? It isn't deleted: it stays in history with book value 0.

adminGastos.title: Expenses
adminGastos.intro: The studio's operating expenses (manual entry). They feed the income statement in Finances.
adminGastos.loadError: Couldn't load the expenses (admin role and rules deployed?).
adminGastos.toConfirmHint: Did you pay these recurring expenses? Confirm so they count in the P&L.

add.title: Add expense
add.recurHint: Recurs on this same date each period. Leave it open-ended to keep going until you stop it.
add.error: Couldn't save the expense. Check the data and try again.

voidModal.title: Void expense
voidModal.message: Void "{concept}"? It isn't deleted: it stays in history and stops counting in the P&L.
voidModal.messageSerie: Stop the "{concept}" series? It stops generating expenses from today; months already confirmed are kept.

adminBalance.title: Balance
adminBalance.intro: Simplified balance sheet: Assets (book value) − Liabilities = Equity. Export it for your accountant or investors.
adminBalance.loadError: Couldn't load the balance (admin role and rules deployed?).

add.title: Add liability
add.name: Concept
add.error: Couldn't save the liability. Check the data and try again.

settleModal.title: Settle liability
settleModal.message: Mark "{name}" as settled? It isn't deleted: it stays in history and stops counting in the balance.

payouts.title: Partner payouts (pending)
payouts.intro: Net amount Only G owes beatmakers/producers for confirmed sales. Already added to the liabilities above. Settled in “Beat sales & payouts”.
payouts.sinSincronizar: {n} unpaid sale(s) without a materialized payout (already included in the total). Sync to see them per person and settle them.
payouts.syncError: Couldn't sync the payouts. Please try again.

adminPerfiles.title: Profiles
adminPerfiles.descripcion: Your showcase. Search, activate or deactivate membership, edit and mark the featured ones (max. {max}). Use “Curate showcase” to order the ones shown first. Profiles without active membership show in gray.
adminPerfiles.curarNota: These are the ones shown first in the showcase; the rest appear by date.
adminPerfiles.mockDescripcion: A filler profile for the showcase, with no link to any user. You fill it in by hand in the editor. You can activate its membership like any other.
adminPerfiles.borrarMensaje: “{nombre}” will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
adminPerfiles.errorCarga: Could not load profiles (check admin role and rules?).
adminPerfiles.errorMaxDestacados: Maximum {max} featured. Remove one before adding another.

membresia.activarDescripcion: Choose how to activate the membership for a month.
membresia.cortesiaHint: Complimentary activates the profile for a month and records no revenue.
membresia.desactivarMensaje: Close {nombre}'s membership? Their profile will stop appearing in the showcase.

link.title: Link a profile to a user
link.descripcion: Create a profile for a real app user. On creation they get the artist role (if they didn't have it). You fill it in the editor and activate membership afterwards.
link.errorBuscar: Could not search users. Are functions deployed?
link.errorYaTiene: That user already has a linked profile.
link.errorCrear: Could not create the linked profile.

producerConsole.description: Your live sessions. No billing data — just who you're serving and when. If you don't start a session, it auto-starts {graceMins} min after the scheduled time.
producerConsole.empty: You have no sessions assigned yet.

availability.title: Your availability
availability.intro: Set your schedule by month. You can apply the default template, adjust each weekday, and mark specific days off.
availability.notDefined: You haven't set your availability for {month} {year}. Set it so clients can book you.
availability.applyToAllDays: Apply this schedule to all days
availability.monthDaysHint: Tap a day to mark it as off or available (one-off exception to the weekly schedule).
availability.scheduleAppliedAll: Schedule applied to all days of the week.
availability.saveError: Could not save. Make sure you have the producer role and that the rules are deployed.
availability.copiedToFuture: Template applied to the next {count} months.
availability.copyError: Could not copy to upcoming months.

alreadyRegistered.title: You're already registered
alreadyRegistered.activeBody: Your artist profile is active. Edit it whenever you want.
alreadyRegistered.pendingBody: Your profile will be activated once the studio confirms your payment. In the meantime, track the status in your requests.

artistOnboarding.heroParagraph: Create your public profile: your music CV with photo, bio, social links, and your best tracks on YouTube/Spotify — with a URL and QR code to share. Valid for 2 months, renewable. Your real name and birth date stay private.
artistOnboarding.pricingNote: After submitting, upload your payment receipt in the chat and the studio will confirm it to activate your profile.

artisticName.label: Artist name
artisticName.hint: This will be your public name and your URL.

alreadyRegistered.title: You already have a profile

errors.invalidName: Your artist name does not generate a valid URL.

producers.notFoundHint: It may no longer exist or the link is incorrect.

na.role: Founder and owner of Only G Music
na.quote: From street rap to founding a label.
na.bio: N.A started in Barranquilla's street rap scene, and from those roots everything grew: he founded and leads Only G Music, the label that today drives a new generation of artists. Producer, beatmaker, and entrepreneur — he is the pulse and vision behind the house sound.

dr-dre.bio: Andre Romelle Young, known as Dr. Dre, is one of the most influential producers in history. Co-founder of N.W.A and the Death Row and Aftermath labels, he discovered and produced Snoop Dogg, Eminem, 50 Cent, and Kendrick Lamar. His albums The Chronic and 2001 are pillars of hip-hop, and with Beats by Dre he revolutionized consumer audio.

statusBar.titleActive: Your subscription is active: your profile appears in the showcase.
statusBar.titleInactive: It will appear in the showcase once your subscription is active.

publishGate.title: Publish your profile
publishGate.message: Your profile is a draft: for now only you can see it. To publish it and have it appear in the artists list for everyone, activate your membership.

errors.autoSave: Could not auto-save. Check your connection and try again.
errors.payment: Could not start payment. Please try again.

photoMobile.hint: The main photo is shown on desktops and large screens. Upload a vertical version (optional) so it isn't badly cropped on phones.
photoMobile.setHint: Mobile portrait photo added. The main one is used on desktops.

photoAdjust.hint: Drag the photo to reframe · adjust zoom and rotation in steps

bio.placeholder: Tell your story, style, and milestones…
